clientConcern: Where can AI create visible value without increasing risk or complexity too early?
architecturalFocus: Prioritize use cases, trust boundaries, and measurable pilot outcomes.
deliverable: Opportunity map and reference experience concept.
successMetric: Executive agreement on first pilot and trust scope.

clientConcern: Can we prove helpfulness fast while keeping the experience simple and safe?
architecturalFocus: Scoped grounding, initial guardrails, and observable user journeys.
deliverable: Pilot solution with selected sources, answer design, and governance baseline.
successMetric: Adoption, satisfaction, and grounded answer quality.

clientConcern: How do we move from promising demos to reliable operating controls?
architecturalFocus: Executable policies, escalation design, logging, and evaluation loops.
deliverable: Governance operating model and control framework.
successMetric: Audit readiness and reduced unmanaged AI risk.

clientConcern: How do multiple teams build on the platform without reinventing the stack?
architecturalFocus: Shared orchestration, model gateway, reusable retrieval, and developer standards.
deliverable: Scalable platform blueprint and rollout patterns.
successMetric: Faster delivery across new AI journeys.

clientConcern: Can the organization operate AI as a trusted enterprise capability across regions and business units?
architecturalFocus: Multi-region resilience, tenant-aware deployment, cost control, and operating cockpit design.
deliverable: Enterprise AI platform roadmap and scale governance model.
successMetric: Reliable, governed growth in production usage.
